product_highlights: Baicapil™ — plant-based tri-active complex (Scutellaria baicalensis, wheat sprout, soy sprout) proven to stimulate hair growth and reduce hair loss by 57%
ProAmplex® — multi-active scalp complex targeting hair follicle stem cells and scalp microbiome balance
Exostem Hair — exosome-inspired plant stem cell extract for scalp rejuvenation
Comprehensive clinical dossiers and in-vitro mechanistic studies supporting efficacy claims
notes: Provital Group is a Barcelona-based cosmetic active ingredient specialist best known for Baicapil™, a plant-based tri-active complex combining Scutellaria baicalensis root extract with wheat and soy sprout extracts. Baicapil™ acts on all three phases of the hair growth cycle and is clinically demonstrated to increase anagen hair by 22% and reduce hair loss by 57% compared to placebo. Provital is a vertically integrated company managing its own botanical extraction, delivering Ecocert and COSMOS-certified actives with comprehensive regulatory and clinical support.
